name: claude-job-search
description: A two-track job-search and interview-prep system for Claude Code. Logs every pipeline event (applied, heard back, interview, rejected, offer) into a Notion Opportunities database (with 7 ready-made views) and a Todoist action layer from one sentence of plain English, and scaffolds first-round interview prep from your calendar, email, CV, and a quick web snapshot. Ships a duplicatable multi-view Notion template and a STAR-story template. Requires the Notion and Todoist MCP connectors (Gmail / Calendar / Drive optional).
